pageContext.name: Dracula
pageContext.description: I am Dracula; and I bid you welcome, Mr. Harker, to my house.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Dracula Fine Art Print, an original horror art print inspired by Bram Stoker's literary classic, as illustrated by artist Mike Mahle.  One of the Gothic greats, Dracula defined generations of vampiric tales to come. Mike Mahle's moody vector art portrait is draped in shadows, with blood red accents giving the outside skies an air of foreboding and hostility. Trapped inside the Transylvanian castle, viewers are treated to a rare audience with the vampire as he descends a stone staircase. Count Dracula clutches a single candle for guidance in the darkness, newly arisen with the full moon's light.  This full bleed giclée presentation would have even the sophisticated vampire count envious! Each Dracula Fine Art Print in the collaborative release with Sideshow features an authorized, automated artist signature in the lower region of the image. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this mesmerizing tribute is a must-have for fans of Dracula's legacy in literature and beyond.  When he calls you to the castle, you cannot resist! Add the Dracula Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle to your horror artwork collection today.
